query:
SELECT DISTINCT questionId 
FROM intakeResponses 
WHERE questionId LIKE '%workflow%' OR questionId LIKE '%orders%' OR questionId LIKE '%images%' OR questionId LIKE '%priors%' OR questionId LIKE '%reports%'
ORDER BY questionId;
